channel.title: blackbox devlog
channel.description: Dev log for the BlackBox CKB point-of-sale device.

item.title: Fortnightly #4: BlackBox Vault companion wallet goes on-chain
item.description: BlackBox Vault — the native Android companion wallet — ships Wave 2 with Nervos DAO, real on-chain ML-DSA-65 post-quantum sends, and biometric security gates; the board emulator gains thermal printer and QR-scanner peripherals.

item.title: Fortnightly #3: Board emulator, LVGL port, and a PQC messaging protocol
item.description: Open-source ESP32 board emulator shrinks the embedded debug loop, BlackBox is being ported to LVGL on top of it, and a new post-quantum messaging protocol (cemp-pq) lands for the backend.

item.title: Fortnightly #2: Wi-Fi flow refactor and V2 prototype on the bench
item.description: Wi-Fi flow refactor lands three new screens and a set of new UI primitives; V2 prototype board on the bench; NFC and Fiber integrations planned.

item.title: Fortnightly #1: UI primitives and the open-source backend stack
item.description: First fortnightly entry. UI redesign steps 1–3 of PLAN.md complete; eight weeks of backend protocol design surfaced as open-source repos; new hardware components unlock NFC and integrated light client paths.

item.title: Hello, wave 2
item.description: Opening entry. Wave 1 (six testing units) shipped; wave 2 starts now.
